_comment.provider: LLM backend: deepseek | zhipu | openai | openrouter | custom
_comment.api_key: API key. Falls back to env var: <PROVIDER>_API_KEY (e.g. DEEPSEEK_API_KEY)
_comment.api_base: Custom API base URL (null = provider default). For custom providers, set this.
_comment.call_template: Shell template for native agent invocation. null = use LLM fallback. Example for nanobot: nanobot agent -c config.json -s watch_reply -m "$MSG"
